name: Journeyman Electrician License
issuer: State Electrical Licensing Board (varies by state)
description: State-issued license allowing an electrician to work independently on residential and commercial electrical systems. Requires completion of a 4–5 year apprenticeship (8,000 hours) or equivalent trade school plus field hours. Exam content is based on the National Electrical Code (NEC). Cost and requirements vary significantly by state.
